# Intake

The controlled mutation entry point: validates and applies writes to the corpus.

**Tier:** Core

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `lithos.intake` | M | 8 | 0 |

## Public API

### `lithos.intake`
- class `DeleteRequest` — Validated input for a Corpus delete.
- class `DeleteOutcome` — Result of a Corpus delete.
- class `WriteRequest` — Validated input for a Corpus write (create or update).
- class `NoteUpdateRequest` — Validated input for a metadata/tags-only note patch (no body).
- class `EdgeRequest` — Validated input for an asserted edge upsert (ADR-0006 Slice 1).
- class `EdgeOutcome` — Result of a Corpus assert_edge.
- class `WriteOutcome` — Result of a Corpus write.
- class `CorpusIntake` — The controlled entry point for Corpus mutations from agent tools.

## Dependencies

- Depends on: [Coordination](Coordination.md), [Errors](Errors.md), [Events](Events.md), [Graph](Graph.md), [Knowledge](Knowledge.md), [Search](Search.md), [Telemetry](Telemetry.md)
- Used by: [CognitiveMemory](CognitiveMemory.md), [Entrypoints](Entrypoints.md), [LCMA](LCMA.md)
